_meta.purpose: Proposed file organization moves for YNAI5 Google Drive taxonomy. Review each entry and set status to 'approved' or 'rejected' before Claude executes any moves.
_meta.instructions: Change status from 'pending' to 'approved' for moves you want executed. Set 'rejected' to skip. Then ask Claude to run /gdrive-org execute.
_meta.warning: NO files will be moved until you explicitly approve. This is a review-first, execute-second system.

proposed_moves.reason: CORE_IDENTITY is a cross-model context file — belongs in the dedicated CROSS_MODEL_SYNC handoff folder
Universal AI guide is a cross-agent reference — belongs in CROSS_MODEL_SYNC alongside CORE_IDENTITY
Infrastructure architecture doc should live on Drive so Gemini can access it directly without needing local file access
VM structure doc belongs in Infrastructure folder on Drive — useful for Gemini and cross-device sessions
Research doc — belongs in Knowledge Base on Drive for Gemini access and archival
Finalized research doc — archive to Knowledge Base
Trade predictions should be on Drive for cross-device access and Gemini analysis
proposed_moves.note: Keep local copy — this is a copy operation, not a move

proposed_moves.reason: Core strategy playbook — belongs in YNAI5_CORE for preservation and cross-device access
